CustomField.description: Average of all 8 MEDDPICC dimension scores (0-10 scale)
CustomField.formula: ( BLANKVALUE(Score_Metrics__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Economic_Buyer__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Decision_Criteria__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Decision_Process__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Paper_Process__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Identify_Pain__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Champion__c, 0) + BLANKVALUE(Score_Competition__c, 0) ) / 8
CustomField.label: Overall Score
